old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4.2","title":"App: DEF CON Confessions - Anonymous mesh board","description":"## Overview

Anonymous message board over mesh. Type on phone, appears on big screen. No accounts, no logs, no tracking.

## Features

### Post a confession
- Phone connects to your T-Echo via BLE
- Simple web app: text box + submit
- Message goes: phone → BLE → node → LoRa → gateway → screen
- No sender ID attached (truly anonymous)

### Big screen feed
- Messages scroll up, newest at bottom
- Auto-expire after 10 minutes (RAM only)
- Optional: upvote from any node, hot messages stay longer

### E-ink display
- Your node shows last N messages from the feed
- Scroll with button
- Or: show only messages with specific hashtag

### Moderation
- Gateway can filter keywords (slurs, etc.)
- No delete capability (that would require tracking who sent what)
- Rate limit: 1 message per node per 30 sec

## Protocol

### Phone → Node (BLE)
```json
{"type": "confession", "text": "I use spaces not tabs"}
```

### Node → Gateway (CoAP)
POST /confessions
```json
{"text": "I use spaces not tabs", "ts": 1234567890}
```
Note: NO source ID in the payload

### Gateway → Dashboard
Broadcast to all connected browsers via WebSocket

## Privacy

- Gateway does not log source node
- Messages stored in RAM only, 10 min TTL
- No analytics, no tracking
- Post-event: nothing to subpoena","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:49:05.23509Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:49:05.23509Z","labels":["demo","app","chat","apps","milestone","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:49:05.368577Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"notes":"## P2P vs Gateway

### P2P-capable (no gateway required)
- Local broadcast chat: node sends message, neighbors display it
- Gossip protocol: messages propagate hop-by-hop with TTL
- E-ink shows last N messages heard

### Gateway-enhanced
- Aggregated feed on big screen
- Keyword filtering/moderation
- Higher throughput (gateway has better antenna/power)
- Web access for phone viewing

### Firmware integration
Broadcast messaging is core protocol. P2P confessions = unauthenticated multicast with TTL. Add message type for "broadcast chat" in app layer.

**Verdict: P2P broadcast works standalone; gateway adds scale + display**"}
